coachVoice.lastWeek:
**4/4 gym this week — but the surface number hides the real story.**

The big signal is **Sumo DL: 225 lb × 6 across all 4 sets at RPE 7**. That's not heavy. Flat RPE 7 across 4 sets means the load is well below threshold — you've got at least 15-20 lb in the tank. You're leaving strength on the table on the one lift that drives posterior-chain volume.

**The accessory completion is collapsing.** Lower B finished 2 of 6 exercises. Upper B finished 3 of 6. That's not a noise pattern — that's structural. Either the sessions are running too long, or the small accessories at the end of the session are the first thing cut when energy/time runs out. Both are fixable, but the fix is structural (reorder), not motivational.

**Mobility = 0/4 weeks since program start.** This isn't a soft signal anymore — it's the variable that produced the back contracture in W16. Heavy compounds + deficit + zero mobility = injury debt. The W16 week was already the cost. Continuing to run zero is choosing to retest that risk.

**Back Squat 215 × 8 × 4 @ RPE 7.9** was clean and Q5 — your best session of the week. Bench RPE crept (8.0 → 8.5 last 2 sets, dropped to 7-rep doubles). OHP got 3 sets at 115 lb — you've been chasing the 4th set for 3 weeks now.

**Body weight: 86.7 kg today, down from 87.7 two weeks ago.** That's −0.5 kg/week ≈ −0.55%/week — exactly the target zone. The deficit is calibrated even without nutrition tracking. But "calibrated by accident" isn't a strategy that survives a stall.

**Two runs at Z2 (HR 131-134, 4.2 km × 2)** — clean execution on the running side.
coachVoice.nextWeek:
**Week 18 is the last hard week before the deload (W19 / Block A week 5).** Three priorities:

**1. Sumo DL gets +15 lb (240 × 6).** No more flat RPE 7 across 4 sets. We need a top set at RPE 8 to know we're loading correctly. If it's still 7 across the board at 240, we go to 250 the week after.

**2. Mobility is mandatory at 3 sessions.** Wed Hip Reset, Sat Lumbar, Sun Hip Reset. Pin them. The W16 back contracture is the why — we're not running that experiment again.

**3. Reorder the late-session accessories so the priorities go first.** Lower B starts with Hip Thrust before BSS so glute work is anchored. Upper B starts the lateral/curl block before Landmine Row.

Bench holds at 205 (RPE was creeping). Squat +5 to 220. Row +5 to 150. OHP — finish all 4 sets at 115 first, then we move it. Chins keep +15 lb, target 4 × 6+ reps.

**Nutrition: 4 days minimum logged this week.** The deficit is working but we can't tell when it stops working without data.

W19 will be the deload (volume −40-50%). One more push week to bank a clean stimulus, then we recover.
